positive: A stylized, minimal illustration of a whimsical, glowing forest lantern. The lantern is suspended by delicate roots and emits a warm, ethereal light that illuminates geometric foliage and crystalline mushrooms surrounding it. The overall composition should be a striking, high-contrast black and white line art with strategic pops of vibrant cyan and gold ink. Style: Detailed woodcut etching combined with modern flat design principles. Composition: Central, symmetrical focus suitable for a chest print. Lighting: Backlit to emphasize the glowing edges. Color direction: Monochrome with selective bioluminescent accents. Ideal for screen printing on dark apparel.
negative: blur, smudge, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, photographic, 3d render, hyperrealism
